title: At Night All Wolves Are Grey
original_title: Varg Veum - I mørket er alle ulver grå
overview: Varg Veum investigates a case where his good friend Even, a highly decorated ex-army officer, is falsely accused of bombing Armakon, a weapons storage facility.
